en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Make two silver trumpets. Of hammered work you shall make them, and you shall use them for summoning the congregation and for breaking camp.
zh: “你要用銀子作兩枝號，要錘出來的，可以用來召集會眾，也可以叫會眾拔營起行。

en: And when both are blown, all the congregation shall gather themselves to you at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
zh: 吹號的時候，全體會眾都要到你那裡，聚集在會幕的門口。

en: But if they blow only one, then the chiefs, the heads of the tribes of Israel, shall gather themselves to you.
zh: 如果單吹一枝，眾領袖，就是以色列的族長，都要到你那裡聚集。

en: When you blow an alarm, the camps that are on the east side shall set out.
zh: 你們吹大聲的時候，那在東邊的營，都要起行。

en: And when you blow an alarm the second time, the camps that are on the south side shall set out. An alarm is to be blown whenever they are to set out.
zh: 你們第二次吹大聲的時候，那在南邊的營，都要起行；他們要起行，必須吹大聲。

en: But when the assembly is to be gathered together, you shall blow a long blast, but you shall not sound an alarm.
zh: 但召集會眾的時候，你們要吹號，卻不要吹大聲。

en: And the sons of Aaron, the priests, shall blow the trumpets. The trumpets shall be to you for a perpetual statute throughout your generations.
zh: 亞倫的子孫作祭司的要作吹號的；這要作你們世世代代永遠的條例。

en: And when you go to war in your land against the adversary who oppresses you, then you shall sound an alarm with the trumpets, that you may be remembered before the LORD your God, and you shall be saved from your enemies.
zh: 你們在本地與欺壓你們的仇敵作戰的時候，就要吹大聲，使你們在耶和華你們的 神面前得蒙記念，也得拯救脫離你們的仇敵。

en: On the day of your gladness also, and at your appointed feasts and at the beginnings of your months, you shall blow the trumpets over your burnt offerings and over the sacrifices of your peace offerings. They shall be a reminder of you before your God: I am the LORD your God."
zh: 此外，在你們快樂的日子和指定的節期，以及月朔，你們獻燔祭和平安祭的時候，也要吹號，這都要在你們的 神面前替你們作為記念；我是耶和華你們的 神。”

en: In the second year, in the second month, on the twentieth day of the month, the cloud lifted from over the tabernacle of the testimony,
zh: 第二年二月二十日，雲彩從法櫃的帳幕收上去的時候，

en: and the people of Israel set out by stages from the wilderness of Sinai. And the cloud settled down in the wilderness of Paran.
zh: 以色列人就從西奈曠野按站起行；雲彩在巴蘭曠野停住了。

en: They set out for the first time at the command of the LORD by Moses.
zh: 這是他們第一次照著耶和華藉摩西吩咐他們的起程。

en: The standard of the camp of the people of Judah set out first by their companies, and over their company was Nahshon the son of Amminadab.
zh: 猶大營的旗號，按著他們的隊伍，首先起行；統領隊伍的，是亞米拿達的兒子拿順。

en: And over the company of the tribe of the people of Issachar was Nethanel the son of Zuar.
zh: 統領以薩迦支派隊伍的，是蘇押的兒子拿坦業。

en: And over the company of the tribe of the people of Zebulun was Eliab the son of Helon.
zh: 統領西布倫支派隊伍的，是希倫的兒子以利押。

en: And when the tabernacle was taken down, the sons of Gershon and the sons of Merari, who carried the tabernacle, set out.
zh: 帳幕拆下來以後，革順的子孫和米拉利的子孫，就抬著帳幕起行。

en: And the standard of the camp of Reuben set out by their companies, and over their company was Elizur the son of Shedeur.
zh: 流本營的旗號，按著他們的隊伍起行；統領隊伍的，是示丟珥的兒子以利蓿。

en: And over the company of the tribe of the people of Simeon was Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.
zh: 統領西緬支派的，是蘇利沙代的兒子示路蔑。

en: And over the company of the tribe of the people of Gad was Eliasaph the son of Deuel.
zh: 統領迦得支派隊伍的，是丟珥的兒子以利雅薩。

en: Then the Kohathites set out, carrying the holy things, and the tabernacle was set up before their arrival.
zh: 哥轄人抬著聖物起行；他們到達之前，人已經把帳幕豎立起來。

en: And the standard of the camp of the people of Ephraim set out by their companies, and over their company was Elishama the son of Ammihud.
zh: 以法蓮營的旗號，按著他們的隊伍起行；統領隊伍的，是亞米忽的兒子以利沙瑪。

en: And over the company of the tribe of the people of Manasseh was Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.
zh: 統領瑪拿西支派隊伍的，是比大蓿的兒子迦瑪列。

en: And over the company of the tribe of the people of Benjamin was Abidan the son of Gideoni.
zh: 統領便雅憫支派隊伍的，是基多尼的兒子亞比但。

en: Then the standard of the camp of the people of Dan, acting as the rear guard of all the camps, set out by their companies, and over their company was Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.
zh: 但營的旗號，作眾營的後隊，按著他們的隊伍起行；統領隊伍的，是亞米沙代的兒子亞希以謝。

en: And over the company of the tribe of the people of Asher was Pagiel the son of Ochran.
zh: 統領亞設支派隊伍的，是俄蘭的兒子帕結。

en: And over the company of the tribe of the people of Naphtali was Ahira the son of Enan.
zh: 統領拿弗他利支派隊伍的，是以南的兒子亞希拉。

en: This was the order of march of the people of Israel by their companies, when they set out.
zh: 這是以色列人起行的時候，按著他們的隊伍起行的次序。

en: And Moses said to Hobab the son of Reuel the Midianite, Moses' father-in-law, "We are setting out for the place of which the LORD said, 'I will give it to you.' Come with us, and we will do good to you, for the LORD has promised good to Israel."
zh: 摩西對自己的岳父米甸人流珥的兒子何巴說：“我們要起行到耶和華應許的地方去，他曾說：‘我要把那地賜給你們’，現在求你與我們同去，我們必善待你，因為耶和華對以色列已經應許福樂。”

en: But he said to him, "I will not go. I will depart to my own land and to my kindred."
zh: 何巴對摩西說：“我不去，我要歸回我本地本族那裡去。”

en: And he said, "Please do not leave us, for you know where we should camp in the wilderness, and you will serve as eyes for us.
zh: 摩西說：“求你不要離開我們，因為你知道我們應怎樣在曠野安營，你可以作我們的眼目。

en: And if you do go with us, whatever good the LORD will do to us, the same will we do to you."
zh: 如果你與我們同去，將來耶和華用甚麼好處待我們，我們也必用甚麼好處待你。”

en: So they set out from the mount of the LORD three days' journey. And the ark of the covenant of the LORD went before them three days' journey, to seek out a resting place for them.
zh: 以色列人從耶和華的山起行，行了三天的路程，耶和華的約櫃在他們前面行了三天的路程，為他們尋找安息的地方。

en: And the cloud of the LORD was over them by day, whenever they set out from the camp.
zh: 他們拔營起行的時候，日間總有耶和華的雲彩在他們上頭。

en: And whenever the ark set out, Moses said, "Arise, O LORD, and let your enemies be scattered, and let those who hate you flee before you."
zh: 約櫃起行的時候，摩西就說： “耶和華啊，求你起來， 願你的仇敵四散； 願恨你的人從你面前逃跑。”

en: And when it rested, he said, "Return, O LORD, to the ten thousand thousands of Israel."
zh: 約櫃停住的時候，他就說： “耶和華啊，求你歸來， 回到以色列的千萬人中。”
